meta.siteDescription: Turnkey smart home integration. Wirenboard, Yandex Alice, KNX automation for premium residences in Kazan.

hero.title:
Automation
that just works
hero.subtitle: We integrate Wirenboard, KNX, Yandex Alice and all smart systems into one seamless ecosystem. Turnkey.

services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: Full cycle — from design to long-term support

wirenboard.title: Wirenboard & KNX
wirenboard.desc: Design and installation of automation panels based on Wirenboard. Logic, scenarios and rules programming.

voice.title: Voice control
voice.desc: Integration with Yandex Alice, Apple HomeKit, Google Home. Control lights, climate and security by voice.

climate.title: Climate & ventilation
climate.desc: Multi-zone climate management, heat recovery units, underfloor heating — all in one interface.

lighting.title: Smart lighting
lighting.desc: Dimming, scenes, circadian rhythms. DALI, DMX, Modbus — we support every protocol.

security.title: Security
security.desc: CCTV, access control, leak and smoke detectors — all integrated into the unified system.

support.title: Support & monitoring
support.desc: 24/7 remote monitoring. Logic and scenario updates without on-site visits.

case1.title: 450 m² Cottage — Rublyovskoye Highway
case1.desc: Full automation: 48 lighting zones, multi-zone climate, video intercom, pool and hammam — all controlled by a single Wirenboard 7 controller. Voice control via Alice in every room.

case2.title: 280 m² Penthouse — Kazan City
case2.desc: Designer DALI lighting integrated with HomeKit. Time-of-day scenes, blind and audio control from one app. Full energy consumption monitoring.

case3.title: 180 m² Townhouse — Skolkovo
case3.desc: Cost-effective yet powerful automation on Wirenboard 6. Smart lighting, climate, security and full Alice integration. Remote monitoring and ongoing support.

about.title: About Continental
about.subtitle: We don't just install equipment — we engineer living ecosystems
about.p1: Continental is a team of engineers and systems integrators focused on complex residential projects. We specialise in Wirenboard and KNX platforms, deeply understand Modbus, MQTT and BACnet protocols and know how to make any equipment work together.
about.p2: Our approach: design and specification first, then installation. We work through every scenario in advance, write logic so the system runs for years without human intervention — and so it can be easily extended later.
about.value1_desc: We document every node and every bus address. No guesswork.
about.value2_desc: Open standards only. No proprietary locks or vendor dependencies.
about.value3_desc: After handover we stay connected. We monitor, update and expand.

contact.title: Discuss a project
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your property — we'll respond within an hour
contact.success_desc: We'll get back to you within an hour.
